name: Rosemary Steak
recipeIngredient: 4 boneless top loin or New York Strip Steaks, (about 6 oz. each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Score steaks in diamond pattern on both sides.
2. Combine the minced rosemary, garlic, oil, lemon peel, pepper, and salt in a small bowl.
3. Rub the mixture onto the surface of the meat.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 15 minutes.
5. Grill the steaks over medium-hot heat for about 4 minutes per side or until medium rare or to desired doneness.
6. Cut steaks diagonally into 1/2 inch thick slices.
7. Garnish with rosemary sprigs.
Makes 4 servings.
